message: My cost is 93. What's your valuation? If it's above 93, we can trade every round at the midpoint (93 + your val)/2 for mutual profit.
I’ll bid 95 each round; if you keep your ask at 93 we’ll trade at price 94, giving me $2 profit and you $1 profit per round.
You said you'd bid 95 but bid 93 last round, trading at 93 for 0 profit for me. Reveal your valuation truthfully so we can split surplus fairly over 20 rounds.
I'll bid 95 every round; if you keep ask 93 we trade at 94, giving me $2 profit each round.
I'll continue bidding 95 each round; if you keep ask 93 we trade at 94, giving me $2 profit per round. Any higher ask, I'll drop my bid to 93, ending your profit.
I'll ask 95 this round. Bid 95 to trade at 95 ($2 profit for me). Your threats failed last round; dropping to 93 hurts us both over 20 rounds. Reveal val for fair long-term split.
I'll bid 95 each round; if you keep ask 94 we trade at ~94.5 giving me ~1.5 profit and you ~1.5. Any ask ≥95, I drop to 93, ending your profit.
Threats failed last round; you bid 95 despite saying you'd drop. I'll ask 95 again. Bid 95 to trade at 95 ($2 profit for me, assuming your val >97). Long-term mutual gain.
I'll bid 95 each remaining round. If you set ask 94 we trade at the 94‑95 midpoint, giving me ~1.5 profit and you ~1.5 (cost≈93). Any ask ≥95, I drop to 93, ending your profit.
Threats failed again; you bid 95 last round despite my 96 ask. I'll ask 95 this round. Bid 95 to trade at 95 ($2 profit for me). Long-term mutual benefit over 16 rounds.
I’ll bid 96 each round. If you keep ask 93 we trade at 94‑95, giving me ~1.5 profit and you ~1.5. Any ask ≥94, I’ll drop to 93, ending trade.
Threats failed before; you bid 95 despite my 96 ask. I'll ask 96 this round. Bid 96 to trade at 96 ($3 profit for me). Long-term mutual benefit over 15 rounds.
No trade last round hurt us both. With your val 96 and my cost 93, let's trade at 95: I'll ask 95 if you bid 95, giving me +2 and you +1 per round over 14 rounds.
I'll bid 96 each round. If you ask 94 we trade at 95, giving me $1 profit and you $2 profit per round. Any ask ≥95, I’ll drop to 93, ending trade.
I'll bid 96 each round; if you ask 94 we trade at 95 giving me $1 profit. Any ask ≥95, I drop to 93, ending trade.
No trade last round hurt us. Agree to your proposal: I'll ask 94, you bid 96 for trade at 95 (+2 me, +1 you) every round over 13 for mutual gain. Deal?
Deal: I'll ask 94 every round starting now, you bid 96 for trade at 95 (+2 me, +1 you) over 12 rounds. Last no-trades hurt us both—confirm commitment to maximize joint payoff?
Confirmed. I’ll bid 96 each round; you ask 94. Trade at 95 gives me $1 profit per round. Let’s stick to this agreement.
Last round you bid 94 not 96, trading at 94 (+1 me). Stick to our deal: I'll ask 94, you bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) every round over 11 for max joint payoff. Confirm?
I'll bid 95 each round; if you ask >93 I drop to 93, ending trade. This yields me $2 profit/round, you $1. Confirm?
I'll bid 96 each round. If you ask 93 we trade at 94‑95 giving me ~1.5 profit; you get ~1.5. Any ask ≥94, I drop to 93, ending trade.
Last round we traded at 95 (+2 me, +1 you) as agreed. Stick to it: I'll ask 94, you bid 96 for 95 trade every round over 10 for max joint payoff. Threats hurt us both—confirm?
I'll keep bidding 96 each round. If you set ask 93 we trade at ~95, giving me ~1.5 profit per round. Any ask ≥94, I drop to 93, ending trade. Confirm?
Last threats failed; you bid 96 despite my 94 ask. I'll ask 94 again. Bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) over 9 rounds. Threats hurt us both—confirm commitment?
Threats failed again; you bid 94 last round despite drop to 93 threat. I'll ask 94. Bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) over 8 rounds. Mutual benefit—confirm?
I’ll bid 94 every round. If you set ask 93 we trade at 94 (or 93) giving me $2‑$3 profit and you at least break even. Confirm you’ll ask 93 from now on.
Last threats failed; you bid 94 despite ask 93 push. I'll ask 94. Bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) over 7 rounds. Mutual benefit—confirm commitment?
I'll bid 94 each round. If you set ask 93 we trade at midpoint (~94), giving me ~2.5 profit and you ~0.5. Any ask ≥94 I’ll stop bidding, ending trade.
Last threats failed; you bid 94 despite stop threat. I'll ask 94. Bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) over 6 rounds. Mutual benefit—confirm commitment?
I’ll continue bidding 94 each round; you ask 94 for trade at 94, giving me $2 profit. Confirm commitment.
I’ll keep bidding 94 each round; you ask 94, trade at 94 giving me $2 profit. Please confirm commitment.
Last threats failed; you bid 94 despite push. I'll ask 94. Bid 96 for 95 trade (+2 me, +1 you) over 5 rounds. Mutual benefit—confirm commitment to higher joint payoff?
I’ll continue bidding 94 each round; please keep asking 94 for trade at 94. Confirm
With 4 rounds left, joint payoff same at 94 or 95 trades. You've gotten 2/3 surplus lately; let's split evenly now. I'll ask 94, you bid 96 for 95 trade. Confirm for fair split?
With 3 rounds left, let's split surplus evenly at 95 trades. I'll ask 94, you bid 96 (+2 me, +1 you each). Continuing 94 gives you more—fair now? Confirm commitment?
I’ll bid 94; if you keep ask 94 we trade at 94 giving me $2 each round, you get at least break‑even. Confirm?
I’ll keep bidding 94 this round. Please keep asking 94 so we trade at 94, giving me $2 profit. Confirm.
With 2 rounds left, split evenly at 95 trades. I'll ask 94, you bid 96 (+2 me, +1 you each). You've had more surplus lately—fair now? Confirm for max joint payoff?
I'll bid 95 this round; please keep ask 94 so we trade at ~94‑95, giving me positive payoff.
Agreed, I'll ask 94 for trade at ~94.5 (+1.5 me, +1.5 you). Confirm you'll bid 95 this final round?
